capabilities.description: Grant the embedded libmpv player commands on the Android 'full' flavor. Defined inline here — NOT as a file in capabilities/ — because Tauri auto-discovers and activates every capability file in that directory regardless of the `capabilities` list. A standalone android-mpv.json would therefore load on the lite flavor too, where it references mpv:default, a permission that only exists when the android-mpv feature compiles the mpv plugin (build fails at the capability step). Inlining scopes it to this config, which is passed via --config only for the full build.
